field.label: Tunnel Token
field.help: The token for your Cloudflare Tunnel. Get it from one.dash.cloudflare.com > Access > Tunnels.

field.label: Disable Auto-Update
field.help: Pass --no-autoupdate to cloudflared. Recommended when managing updates manually via the Install/Update Binary button.

field.label: Enable Post-Quantum Encryption
field.help: Pass --post-quantum to enable post-quantum cryptography for the tunnel connection.

field.label: Max Socket Buffer (kern.ipc.maxsockbuf)
field.help: Recommended value for QUIC performance. Default is 16777216.

field.label: UDP Recv Space (net.inet.udp.recvspace)
field.help: Recommended value for QUIC performance. Default is 8388608.
